articles.title: Church announces dedication of new Nauvoo Temple Visitors’ Center
articles.description: Elder Gerrit W. Gong will dedicate the new Nauvoo Temple Visitors’ Center and the restored Brigham and Mary Ann Young Home on June 27.
articles.content:
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints will dedicate the new Nauvoo Temple Visitors’ Center and the restored Brigham and Mary Ann Young Home on a historic date in Church history.

articles.title: 'It is staggering to win': Cheltenham’s East Glos Club named LTA Club of the Year
articles.description: Club president John King was on hand to accept the gong at the ceremony which was held at the National Tennis Centre in Roehampton on Thursday 16 April.
articles.content:

articles.title: Laureus World Sports Awards 2026: Indian Women's Cricket Team Nominated For 'World Team Of The Year' Gong - Where To Watch
articles.description: The 2026 Laureus World Sports Awards in Madrid will spotlight a landmark nomination for India, with the women's cricket team in contention for World Team of the Year.
articles.content: The 2026 Laureus World Sports Awards will be held on Monday, April 20, at the Palacio de Cibeles in Madrid, marking the third consecutive year the city hosts the ceremony. This year's edition adopts a “for athletes, by athletes” approach, with leadin... [2830 chars]

articles.title: Meet a Paralympian medalist who trains at Michigan’s premier shooting facility
articles.description: YanXiao Gong participated in the 2024 Paralympic Games in Paris, bringing home the silver medal in 25 meter mixed shooting.
articles.content:
HILLSDALE, MI — YanXiao Gong represented the United States well.
Gong, 27, participated in the 2024 Paralympic Games in Paris, bringing home the silver medal in 25 meter mixed shooting. He also competed in 10 meter air pistol and 50 meter free pistol... [1908 chars]

articles.title: UMT student drowns attempting to save friend in Lata Ulu Kasar
articles.description: BANDAR PERMAISURI: A female student of Universiti Malaysia Terengganu (UMT) Gong Badak Campus, Kuala Nerus, drowned while trying to save her friend who was drowning at Lata Ulu Kasar here on Sunday (April 19).
articles.content:
BANDAR PERMAISURI: A female student of Universiti Malaysia Terengganu (UMT) Gong Badak Campus, Kuala Nerus, drowned while trying to save her friend who was drowning at Lata Ulu Kasar here on Sunday (April 19).

articles.title: ‘Way out of line’: Campton Hills internal drama goes public as trustee blasts colleagues as ‘Gong Show’
articles.description: In a series of blistering emails, Campton Hills Trustee Janet Burson called out Treasurer Patsy Smith as the source of the village's internal disfunction and Village President Barbara Wojnicki for allowing it.
